title: Fulfilled Longing
body:
¿You miss the old world generation before the 1.17?

this datapack will maybe satisfied that yearning.


Fulfilled Longing is a datapack for try to recreate the world gen before the Caves & Cliffs update.

the datapack replace some biomes, the world building Height, structures and ore distribution.

this datapack is my 3rd datapack. but the first one to change the world.


Biomes replaced.

All the new mountains [Extreme Hills and variants]

Cherry Grove [Extreme Hills Forest]

Meadow [Now Are plains]

Mangrove Swamp [Swamp]

Height

Max Height: 256

Min Height: 0

﻿
Structures Deleted

Ancient Cities [deep dark still appear]

Trail Ruins

Pillager Outposts

Ruined Portals

the trial chambers still appear. but bugged.


this datapack still should have the probability to generate the new mountains. but in a major rarity
being them some "rare" mostly where the Deep Dark Generates.

the copper ore and veins does't appear anymore. but the copper should appear in the loot table of
drowneds
